bestForPages.whyFit: As a startup founder, you need a professional brand identity fast and on a budget. Our AI generates production-ready logos in seconds, saving you thousands on designer fees and weeks of back-and-forth.

faq.question: Is this suitable for a real startup brand?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our AI generates professional-quality logos used by thousands of startups. You get full commercial usage rights and vector SVG files ready for print, web, and app icons.

faq.question: How much does it cost for a startup?
faq.answer: You can try for free (3 designs/day). Paid plans start at $4.99/mo for 50 designs — far less than hiring a designer ($500-5000+ per logo).

faq.question: Can I get multiple logo options to test?
faq.answer: Yes! Generate as many variations as you want. Each generation creates multiple style options you can compare, iterate on, and download.

bestForPages.whyFit: Freelancers need a polished personal brand without a design team. Our AI helps you create professional logos for your portfolio, invoices, and social profiles in minutes.

faq.question: Can I use the logos for my freelance business?
faq.answer: Yes! All generated logos come with full commercial usage rights. Use them on your website, business cards, invoices, and social media.

faq.question: Is the free tier enough for a freelancer?
faq.answer: The free tier (3 logos/day) is great for trying out ideas. Most freelancers find the Basic plan ($4.99/mo) gives them plenty of room to experiment and create the perfect brand.

vsPages.competitorPrice: $20/mo for basic, up to $129 for brand kit
competitorWeaknesses: Looka charges $20+ just to download a logo — our free tier lets you try first
Looka's brand kit costs $129 — we include commercial rights in all plans
Looka requires full signup before showing any results

faq.question: Is this a good alternative to Looka?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer comparable AI-generated logo quality at a fraction of the price. Our free tier lets you see results before paying, unlike Looka which requires payment to download.

faq.question: Can I switch from Looka?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Sign up, generate logos for free, and see how they compare. Many users switch for the lower pricing and included commercial rights.
